mnemonics: G.U.I.D.E. Your Design: Guidelines, Understand, Interpret, Develop, Evaluate
keyPoints: Guidelines are frameworks, not rigid rules, meant to be adapted to context.
Interpret guidelines by understanding the underlying principle or heuristic they represent.
Always test guideline implementation with real users to validate its effectiveness.
commonMistakes: Treating design guidelines as absolute laws that cannot be broken.
Applying guidelines from one platform (e.g., iOS HIG) to another (e.g., Material Design) without adaptation.
Prioritizing strict adherence to a guideline over actual user needs and usability.
